positive: A minimalist, celestial mountain range silhouette viewed against a dramatic, gradient sky. The mountains are composed of sharp, elegant peaks forming a central, symmetrical composition. The sky transition moves from deep indigo at the top to soft lavender and pale gold near the horizon line. Include stylized, scattered constellations and abstract, bioluminescent flora elements subtly integrating into the mountain forms. The style should be clean vector illustration mixed with ethereal watercolor wash background, achieving high contrast and excellent negative space. Perfect for screen printing on apparel. Symmetry, high contrast, detailed silhouette, ethereal, deep colors, clean lines, art deco geometric influence, radial composition.
negative: text, signature, watermark, logo, trademark, copyright, letter, words, blurry, low resolution, ugly, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, grainy, artifact, jpeg artifacts, cropped, sketch, photorealism, hyperdetailed, color bleed, monochrome only
